summary: Full BUILD 6 testing — RADAR + CRM modules. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend tests passed including RADAR queue, GestionModal, CRM list, CRM 360° profile, gestion registration E2E, and PTP registration E2E.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> — React dev toolbar injects span inside option elements causing HTML hydration warning. Minor, does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: CRMCliente.tsx GestionModal select has no data-testid (unlike Radar.tsx modal). Minor testability issue.
CRMCliente.tsx PTP modal inputs have no data-testid. Minor testability issue.
The <option> elements in CRMList.tsx score filter render a <span> wrapper (from React dev tools) causing console warning — not a code issue per se.

test_results_detail.6A-2: PASS — queue items have all required fields: loanbook_id, cliente_nombre, bucket, dpd_actual, total_a_pagar, dias_para_protocolo, whatsapp_link
test_results_detail.6A-3: PASS — queue ordered RECUPERACION → CRITICO → URGENTE → ACTIVO
test_results_detail.6A-4: PASS — /api/radar/semana returns esperadas, pagadas, pendientes, nuevas_moras
test_results_detail.6B-2: PASS — POST /api/crm/{id}/nota adds note with texto and id
test_results_detail.6B-3: PASS — POST gestion appears in gestiones[] of CRM profile
test_results_detail.6B-4: PASS — POST gestion with prometió_fecha sets ptp_fecha
test_results_detail.6C-3: PASS — Sidebar shows RADAR and CRM under COBRANZA group
test_results_detail.6C-4: PASS — /radar loads with KPI bar and RadarCards
test_results_detail.6C-5: PASS — /cartera redirects to /agente-contable (no old cartera content)
test_results_detail.6D-1: PASS — /radar loads without 500 errors, no browser console errors
test_results_detail.6D-2: PASS — RadarCards show score badge (stars + letter), colored bucket badge, WhatsApp direct link button
test_results_detail.6D-3: PASS — GestionModal opens, has canal buttons, resultado dropdown, nota textarea, PTP date field visible only when resultado includes 'prometió'
test_results_detail.6D-4: PASS — /crm loads client list with bucket and score filters working
test_results_detail.6D-5: PASS — /crm/{id} loads 360° profile with crm-header, gestiones-timeline, gestion-btn, ptp-btn
test_results_detail.6E-1: PASS — Register gestion from /crm/{id} appears in timeline after submit (fetchData called)
test_results_detail.6E-2: PASS — Register PTP from /crm/{id} shows 'PTP registrado' toast and page reloads

seed_data_creation: Used existing test loans (test3-lb001, test3-lb005) from previous builds
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUILD 6 all tests pass. RADAR at /radar, CRM at /crm and /crm/{id}. Old /api/cartera/* routes return 404. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_build6_radar_crm.py. Minor: CRMCliente.tsx gestion/PTP modal inputs lack data-testid attributes.
